goal: Plan executor wiring and add an inert wiring-readiness layer that defines wiring boundaries, records approval state, and proves no actual wiring exists, without making the executor scaffold reachable.
userDecision: Approve executor wiring planning and inert readiness work only; actual executor wiring remains unapproved.
excludedByUser: executor call paths from app runtime, UI, write_flow, or apply_setting_change
GUI real-write controls design or wiring
wiringReadinessModules: not imported by src/ui/mod.rs, src/ui/app.rs, src/ui/model.rs, or src/ui/window.rs
wiringBoundaryPlan: executor-scaffold-boundary: the inert safe-write executor scaffold stays unwired; no code path may make its execute entry point reachable
write-flow-boundary: write_flow must not import or call structured-family executor code
apply-setting-change-boundary: apply_setting_change remains scalar-only and never dispatches structured-family executor work
ui-reachability-boundary: no UI model, window, or control may reach executor or wiring-readiness code
filesystem-boundary: no real config file, include file, or user config directory may be written
backup-restore-boundary: no real backup creation and no restore execution
rollback-recovery-boundary: no rollback file creation and no rollback or recovery execution
reload-runtime-boundary: no Hyprland reload, no mutating hyprctl, no runtime mutation, no command runner
every boundary records wiringAllowed false and crossingRequiresExplicitApproval true
boundaries are universal; none is family-specific and none ranks families
wiringReadinessBehavior: readiness model is planning-only and compiles without touching runtime paths
preflight rejects by default with passed false and wiringMayProceed false
approval state reports executorWiringApproved false and executorWired false
readiness report keeps every activation, reachability, and real-write flag false
wiring candidates are boundary-level integration points recorded as wired false and approved false
no function calls the executor scaffold, write_flow, or apply_setting_change
no function writes files, creates backups, restores files, or creates rollback files
no function runs commands, calls hyprctl, reloads Hyprland, or mutates runtime
no function references the real Hyprland config path or config directory
no function is reachable from current UI
uiReachabilityBoundary: wiring-readiness module is not imported by src/ui/mod.rs, src/ui/app.rs, src/ui/model.rs, or src/ui/window.rs
no GTK control can call any wiring-readiness function
no user-facing real-write controls were designed or wired
no Apply button wiring was added
future UI surfaces stay review-only until GUI real-write controls are separately approved
writeFlowBoundary: structured-family records remain disconnected from the scalar write flow
applySettingChangeBoundary: apply_setting_change does not call the wiring-readiness module
apply_setting_change does not call the executor scaffold
apply_setting_change remains scalar-only for existing production paths
executorScaffoldBoundary: executor scaffold remains inert, unwired, and rejected by default
wiring-readiness module does not import or call the executor scaffold
executor scaffold does not import the wiring-readiness module
only a future explicitly approved wiring scaffold sprint may define a caller, and it must fail closed on any missing approval
filesystemBoundary: wiring-readiness source does not call fs::write
wiring-readiness source does not call File::create
wiring-readiness source does not call write_all
wiring-readiness source does not call serde_json::to_writer
wiring-readiness source does not use std::fs or std::process
backupRestoreBoundary: wiring readiness records the backup-restore boundary as not approved
backup and restore approval remain required before any future execution
rollbackRecoveryBoundary: wiring readiness records the rollback-recovery boundary as not approved
rollback approval remains required before any future rollback execution
reloadRuntimeBoundary: wiring-readiness source does not call hyprctl or run commands
read-only runtime evidence was collected outside the sandbox without mutation
reload and runtime mutation require future explicit approval
sourceGuardPlan: no-executor-call: the wiring-readiness module must never call the safe-write executor scaffold execute entry point
no-write-flow-call: the wiring-readiness module must never import or call write_flow
no-apply-setting-change-call: the wiring-readiness module must never call apply_setting_change
no-filesystem-write: the wiring-readiness module must never call fs::write, File::create, write_all, or serde_json::to_writer
no-real-config-reference: the wiring-readiness module must never reference the real Hyprland config path or config directory
no-command-runner: the wiring-readiness module must never spawn processes, call hyprctl, or include a reload execution path
no-gtk-controls: the wiring-readiness module must never create GTK widgets, buttons, or connect_clicked handlers for real writes
no-approval-flag-flip: the wiring-readiness module must never set wiring, activation, or real-write approval flags to true
guards are enforced by tests/structured_family_executor_wiring_readiness.rs source-level regression tests
reachability guards also re-prove the executor scaffold remains unreachable from main, write_flow, and UI sources
futureApprovalGates: approve or reject actual executor wiring scaffold before any wiring code is written
approve executor wiring before the scaffold can become reachable
approve GUI real-write controls before UI controls are designed or wired
approve real write scope before any real config target can be enabled
approve backup execution before any backup is created
approve restore execution before any restore is executed
approve rollback execution before any rollback is executed
approve reload policy before any reload path is enabled
approve runtime mutation policy before any runtime mutation path is enabled
approve activation subset selection before any family is selected
approve first real config write before any real config write starts
approve production readiness before any production claim is made
nextRecommendedWork: Stop for explicit user decision: approve or reject actual executor wiring scaffold.
